name: ExtensionSearchParameter_Constraint
title: R5: FHIRPath expression that constraints the usage of this SearchParamete (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SearchParameter.constraint` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SearchParameter.constraint` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SearchParameter.constraint` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SearchParameter.constraint` has a context of SearchParameter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SearchParameter`.
Element `SearchParameter.constraint` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: FHIRPath expression that constraints the usage of this SearchParamete (new)
